service_line_config.name: oracle_applications
service_line_config.tech_context: This project is built on Oracle Applications platform. Key technologies and concepts: - Core Products: Oracle Fusion Cloud (ERP, HCM, SCM, CX), Oracle E-Business Suite (EBS) - UI: Oracle Visual Builder (VBCS), Oracle JET, APEX, ADF - Backend: PL/SQL, Oracle REST Data Services (ORDS), SOA composites, OIC integrations - Integration: Oracle Integration Cloud (OIC), Oracle SOA Suite, FBDI, BIP reports, REST/SOAP APIs - Data: Oracle Database, Oracle Analytics Cloud, OTBI, BI Publisher, SQL queries - Workflow: Oracle BPM, approval workflows, notifications - Security: Oracle IDCS/IAM, data roles, security contexts, duty roles, function security - DevOps: Oracle Cloud lifecycle management, sandbox environments, migration tools - Extensions: Oracle Fusion extensibility (Application Composer, page composer, sandbox)

artifact_overrides.module_extraction: Map modules to Oracle functional areas: financials (GL, AP, AR), procurement, supply chain, HCM, CX/sales, reporting and analytics. Focus on customizations, extensions, and integrations being built.
artifact_overrides.functional_req: - Specify whether a requirement uses standard Oracle configuration, VBCS extension, or custom PL/SQL - Reference Oracle Fusion modules, objects, and flexfields when relevant - For integration requirements, specify OIC, FBDI, BIP, or REST/SOAP approach - For EBS projects, reference forms, concurrent programs, and interfaces
artifact_overrides.nonfunctional_req: - Oracle Cloud service availability and SLA dependencies - FBDI and bulk import performance for large data volumes - OIC connection and message rate limits - Report generation time for OTBI and BIP reports - Data security and role-based access performance - Backup and disaster recovery within Oracle Cloud
artifact_overrides.task: - Oracle configuration: setup tasks, flexfields, lookups, value sets, profiles - Extension development: Application Composer, VBCS pages, custom objects - PL/SQL development: packages, procedures, concurrent programs - Integration: OIC flows, FBDI templates, BIP report development, API configuration - Data migration: FBDI loads, data conversion programs, reconciliation scripts - Security: role configuration, data access policies, duty role assignment - Testing: functional validation, integration testing, data reconciliation
artifact_overrides.test_case: - Test with multiple Oracle security roles and data access contexts - Test FBDI bulk loads with production-scale data volumes - Test OIC integrations with error handling and retry scenarios - Test concurrent program execution and scheduling - Verify data security policies restrict cross-business-unit access - Test reports with various parameter combinations and data volumes
artifact_overrides.architecture: - Oracle Cloud environment topology: development, test, production pods - Module architecture: which Oracle modules are in scope and integration points - Extension architecture: Application Composer vs VBCS vs custom development - Integration architecture: OIC patterns, FBDI pipelines, real-time vs batch - Reporting architecture: OTBI, BIP, Oracle Analytics Cloud - Security architecture: role hierarchy, data security, function security - Migration architecture: FBDI strategy, data conversion approach
artifact_overrides.risk_entry: - Oracle Cloud update cycle impact (quarterly patches may affect customizations) - OIC connection limits and throttling under high integration volumes - FBDI import failures and data quality issues at scale - Extension compatibility with Oracle quarterly updates - Data migration complexity across multiple Oracle modules - Performance degradation with complex security rules on large datasets
